name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetCharacterCollisionsHelper.Spin
summary: Sliding friction turned into spin 80.0 (used in demo videos) good for rest of default params below.  If 0.0 then no collision enhancement.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 100.0f.
